name: czrecoil_frame_select_directsound
description: CZRecoilFrame::OnMenuSelectDirectSound selects the DirectSound audio backend option.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the czrecoil_frame_audio_api_selectors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja decompilation at 0x431a90 validates a tail call to zSnd::SetAudioApiOption(zSndBackend_DirectSound).
The native smoke selects A3D first, then verifies OnMenuSelectDirectSound restores audioApi and active backend to 0.
